questionHtml:
Which of these statements are correct?

I. Zinc is not a transition element.
II. Ligands are Lewis bases.
III. Manganese(II) chloride is paramagnetic.

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: Which of these statements are correct? I. Zinc is not a transition element.II. Ligands are Lewis bases.III. Manganese(II) chloride is paramagnetic. A. I and II only B. I and III on
